description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and a dark, forged metal blade. The handle is medium brown with visible wood grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The blade is wide and wedge-shaped, with a single sharp cutting edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a traditional appearance. The metal head is securely mounted onto the handle, with a visible transition between the wood and metal. There are no visible engravings or brand markings on the blade or handle. The overall design suggests it is intended for chopping wood or similar tasks in an urban or residential setting.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a wide, dark metal blade, designed for chopping tasks. The handle is smooth and brown, while the blade is wedge-shaped and robust.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden handle and the full profile of the wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: Full-length side view highlighting the entire handle's curvature and the broad cutting edge of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the handle's ergonomic curve and the thickness of the blade.
description_view_3: Reverse full-length view showing the handle's length and the blade's beard and poll.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, ergonomic grip, and oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a pronounced beard and a flat poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
